ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location description of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station in meters */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the station was last calibrated */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of weather station (e.g., ground, satellite) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meteorological_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated weather station */,
  "time_str" TEXT /* Time in HH:MM format when data was collected */,
  "wind_dir" INTEGER /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "wind_sp" REAL /* Wind speed in meters/second */,
  "temp_deg" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "dewpoint_deg" REAL /* Dew point temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "pressure_mbar" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in millibar */,
  "qnh_mbar" REAL /* QNH pressure in millibar */,
  "qfe_mbar" REAL /* QFE pressure in millibar */,
  "time_val" INTEGER /* Time value as integer (e.g., seconds since start) */,
  "data_quality_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the data is validated or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meteorological_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the data (e.g., API, web interface) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES meteorological_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., Temperature) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated weather station */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast_temp" REAL /* Forecasted temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "forecast_precipitation" REAL /* Forecasted precipitation in mm */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast (e.g., 0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated weather station */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., Storm Warning) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "issued_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was issued */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the alert expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_alerts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated weather station */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical data */,
  "average_temp" REAL /* Average temperature on the date in degrees Celsius */,
  "total_precipitation" REAL /* Total precipitation on the date in mm */,
  "average_humidity" REAL /* Average humidity on the date in % */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated data entry */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., satellite, ground station) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the data collection */,
  "collection_time" TEXT /* Time of day when the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES meteorological_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated data entry */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data quality (e.g., validated, flagged) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the quality assessment */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the quality assessment was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES meteorological_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert setting */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated weather station */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., temperature, wind speed) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the alert is active or not */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method used to notify users of the alert (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_settings_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user being assigned a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assigned role */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the role assignment expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES users_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version history entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated data entry */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the data was last changed */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_history_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES meteorological_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrumentation" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated weather station */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of instrument (e.g., thermometer, barometer) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the instrument */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the instrument was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrumentation_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)
